svg.text: LLM Prompt Structure: Text2SQL Semantic Validation

text.tspan: Task: "You are a data science expert. Evaluate whether the provided SQL query correctly
answers the question given the database schema."
• DDL Schema: Table definitions, columns, relationships
• NL Question: Natural language query from user
• SQL Query: Generated SQL to validate
Can the question be answered from schema?
Type coercion • Case-insensitive • Permissive GROUP BY
"explanation": "<empty if CORRECT, else ≤200 chars describing issue>" }
